name: io.github.jamescampbell/prosp-mcp
title: Prosp LinkedIn Automation
description: MCP server for Prosp.ai LinkedIn outreach automation - manage leads, campaigns, and outreach sequences

environmentVariables.name: PROSP_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Prosp API key (get it from https://prosp.ai/settings)

environmentVariables.name: TOOL_CATEGORIES
environmentVariables.description: Comma-separated list of tool categories to load (leads). Defaults to all.
